zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Vaux於1149年7月21日出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德時，她的父親Hubert de Vaux47歲，母親Grecia Munchensy Cumberland39歲。她和William de Briwere II至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1217年3月24日在英國英格蘭戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Vaux was born on 21 July 1149, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, her father, Hubert de Vaux, was 47 and her mother, Grecia Munchensy Cumberland, was 39. She had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with William de Briwere II. She died on 24 March 1217, in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Vaux est née le 21 juillet 1149, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hubert de Vaux, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Grecia Munchensy Cumberland, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec William de Briwere II. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1217, à Stoke Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stoke Damerel, Devon, England: Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Vaux am 21. Juli 1149 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert de Vaux 47 und ihre Mutter Grecia Munchensy Cumberland 39. Sie hatte mit William de Briwere II mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. März 1217 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con William de Briwere II. Morì il 24 marzo 1217, nel Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Vauxが1149年7月21日にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで生まれた時，父Hubert de Vauxは47歳，母Grecia Munchensy Cumberlandは39歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Briwere IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1217年3月24日にイギリスイギリスデボンストク ダムレルで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Vaux(이)가 1149년 7월 21일 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert de Vaux(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grecia Munchensy Cumberland(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 William de Briwere II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1217년 3월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토크 다머에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Vaux nasceu em 21 de julho de 1149, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hubert de Vaux, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Grecia Munchensy Cumberland, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com William de Briwere II. Ela faleceu em 24 de março de 1217, em Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Stoke Damerel, Devon, England: Stoke Damerel, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Vaux родилась 21 июля 1149 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hubert de Vaux было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Grecia Munchensy Cumberland, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от William de Briwere II. Она умерла 24 марта 1217 г. в местности сток дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con William de Briwere II. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1217, en Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
